messages.content:
I don’t have the cached policy text here. Please provide the policy you want summarized (paste the text or share a link), or tell me which policy it is (privacy policy, security policy, employee handbook, etc.).

If you’d like, I can deliver:
- a high-level executive summary (1–2 paragraphs),
- a bullet-point outline of key points (purpose, scope, data handling, rights, enforcement),
- a line-by-line condensed version, or
- a plain-language version for non-experts.

Also tell me the audience (legal team, general users, executives) and desired length.
